## Summary

When the evaluation is complete but the Narrative Synthesis is still generating, users see "Report Ready — Narrative Synthesis loading" but don't know where to look. Adds "(see below)" to both the header title and progress bar label to direct users to scroll down.

## Scope

- **Changed:** `components/EvaluationPoller.tsx` — header title string
- **Changed:** `components/evaluation-poller-display.ts` — progress bar label string
- **Not touched:** No logic changes, no helper text changes (helper text already says "ready below")

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Zero risk — two string changes only
